stories.title: Claude Code is steganographically marking requests
stories.summary: Investigation reveals Claude Code embeds hidden watermarks in its output, raising concerns about AI transparency and user trust in coding assistants.

stories.title: Claude Sonnet 5
stories.summary: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5, its latest mid-tier model promising improved reasoning and coding capabilities with faster response times.

stories.title: Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5
stories.summary: The US Department of Commerce lifts export restrictions on Anthropic's advanced Claude models Fable 5 and Mythos 5, enabling broader international access to frontier AI.

stories.title: Claude Science
stories.summary: Anthropic introduces Claude Science, a specialized AI product designed for scientific research, analysis, and hypothesis generation across disciplines.

stories.title: Zluda 6 release (run unmodified CUDA applications on non-Nvidia GPUs)
stories.summary: ZLUDA 6 enables running unmodified CUDA applications on non-Nvidia GPUs, potentially breaking Nvidia's dominance in AI compute and lowering hardware costs.

stories.title: From brain waves to words: a new path to communication without surgery
stories.summary: Meta's brain2qwerty AI system decodes brain signals into text without invasive surgery, opening new possibilities for non-invasive brain-computer interfaces.

stories.title: TabFM: A zero-shot foundation model for tabular data
stories.summary: Google Research introduces TabFM, a foundation model that achieves strong performance on tabular data tasks without task-specific training, simplifying enterprise ML workflows.

stories.title: Firms that adopt AI grow headcount 10% over the two years following adoption
stories.summary: Data from Ramp shows companies adopting AI tools actually increase headcount by 10% within two years, countering fears that AI leads to mass layoffs.

stories.title: America can switch off AI. Europe must switch gears before it's too late
stories.summary: Analysis argues Europe must accelerate its AI strategy or risk falling behind as the US maintains leverage over global AI infrastructure and model access.

stories.title: Matrix Orthogonalization Improves Memory in Recurrent Models
stories.summary: Research demonstrates that matrix orthogonalization techniques significantly improve long-term memory retention in recurrent neural networks, a step forward for sequence modeling.
